cards.back: A method of converting Entity-Relationship (ER) diagrams into Relational Database Design

cards.front: What is the purpose of ER-to-Relational mapping?
cards.back: To transform high-level conceptual design into a more concrete and efficient logical design

cards.front: What is an Entity in ER modeling?
cards.back: A thing or concept in the real world that the database will store information about

cards.front: What is an Attribute in ER modeling?
cards.back: A characteristic or feature of an entity that can have multiple values

cards.front: What is normalization in database design?
cards.back: The process of organizing data in a database to minimize data redundancy and dependency
